Meridian
ProductLive SignalsManifestoPricing↳ styleguide
01product

An instrument for what your customers are about to do.

Meridian replaces six dashboards with a calibration log and a signal kernel. Your reports don't live in a different system anymore — they live inside the cohort definition that produced them.

↳ v0.1 · pre-release

03walkthrough

Three stages. Each one earns the next.

Scroll the section. The left column stays put; the right scrubs through.

↳ instrument cluster
How
Meridian
works.
  1. 01ingest
  2. 02calibrate
  3. 03signal
  1. stage 01 · ingest◉

    Stream every customer event into the workspace.

    Stripe, Hubspot, the warehouse you already pay for — Meridian consumes them with no transform layer in front. Schema drift is logged, not feared.

    throughput1.2M events / hr
    01 / 03
  2. stage 02 · calibrate✻

    Build cohorts the way an engineer builds tests.

    SQL where it's faster, a typed cohort DSL where SQL gets in the way. Every cohort versions itself, every metric remembers the definition that produced it.

    throughput12 cohort versions / day
    02 / 03
  3. stage 03 · signal⌖

    Subscribe to changes — not dashboards.

    A churn-risk signal fires when the model says so. The CEO's KPI panel updates without anyone watching. The on-call rep gets the row before the customer churns.

    throughputp50 detection: 4m
    03 / 03
04capability

Six instruments — one mount.

Each capability is a discrete primitive. Compose. Stack. Tear off the ones you don't use.

01 ›∑

Cohort calculus

A typed DSL above SQL. Versioned cohorts. Definitions outlive analysts.

02 ›◦

Signal kernel

Streaming detection on derived fields. Pushes deltas, not snapshots.

03 ›⟁

Calibration log

Every metric remembers why. Why is grepable; why is the API.

04 ›▢

Workspace cache

DuckDB sits between the dashboard and Snowflake. The bill drops.

05 ›↺

Replay window

Backfill a cohort definition to any prior date. Rewind the answer.

06 ››_

Operator console

A CLI that's as fast as the API. No clicks where typing is faster.

Make the next
customer hour count.
